subcodes.first_line: O companion of the friends! Turn thy gaze to the realm of the All-Glorious, dedicate thyself wholly to the hidden Kingdom, and offer up this prayer, O beloved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس یاران توجه بجهان یزدان نما و تبتل بملکوت پنهان کن و این مناجات بنما ای دلبر
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @mystical themes, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
